records.question: Which user accounts named Mark have written reviews for items?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT useracct.u_id FROM useracct
JOIN review ON useracct.u_id = review.u_id
JOIN item ON review.i_id = item.i_id
WHERE useracct.name = 'Mark'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT useracct.u_id
FROM useracct
JOIN review ON useracct.u_id = review.u_id
WHERE useracct.name = 'Mark'

records.question: Which users named Helen have reviewed the item titled avocado?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT useracct.u_id FROM useracct
JOIN review ON useracct.u_id = review.u_id
JOIN item ON review.i_id = item.i_id
WHERE item.title = 'avocado' AND useracct.name = 'Helen'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT useracct.u_id
FROM useracct
JOIN review ON useracct.u_id = review.u_id
JOIN item ON review.i_id = item.i_id
WHERE useracct.name = 'Helen' AND item.title = 'avocado'

records.question: Which user accounts have given reviews with a rating of at least 10?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT useracct.u_id FROM useracct
JOIN review ON useracct.u_id = review.u_id
JOIN item ON review.i_id = item.i_id
WHERE review.rating >= 10
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT u_id FROM review WHERE rating >= 10
